title: Blazing Flint and Steel
description: An upgraded flint and steel that allows players to set living entities on fire by right-clicking them
body:
# Blazing Flint and Steel
An upgraded flint and steel that allows players to set living entities on fire by right-clicking them.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a45e447e27561f0bfbe991213bd5d525610cb5.png)

Durability is doubled (128)

Seconds entities are set on fire is configurable
